new_classes.label_de: Tokajwein in Behältnissen mit einem Fassungsvermögen von 2 Litern oder weniger (KN 2204 22 33)
new_classes.definition_en: Semi-sparkling wine of fresh grapes bearing the Tokaj protected designation of origin, presented in containers of a nominal volume not exceeding 2 litres, classified under CN 2204 22 33 in accordance with additional note 4(B)(b) to Chapter 22.

coverage_explanation: The axioms capture the three primary distinguishing criteria for CN 2204 22 33: (1) it is a semi-sparkling wine (subClassOf SemiSparklingWine), (2) it bears the Tokaj PDO (restriction on ProtectedDesignationOfOriginQuality and TokajRegion), and (3) it is presented in containers ≤ 2 L (restriction on SmallContainer). Coverage is incomplete because additional note 4(B)(b) to Chapter 22 contains specific oenological and regulatory criteria for Tokaj (e.g. grape varieties, sugar content thresholds, ageing requirements, production area details) that are referenced but not reproduced in the legal text supplied. Without the full content of additional note 4(B)(b), those finer criteria cannot be modelled, hence the score is set at 0.72.
